subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted to the beauty of the All-Merciful! Praise be to God that through the holy fragrances ye have been awakened from the slumber of desire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبان جمال رحمانی حمد خدا را که بنفحات قدس از رقد هوی مبعوث شدید و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @presence of; reunion with God, @praise and encouragement
